'''âh-r-f''' ('''harafa''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:filter|filter]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-r-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:filter|filter]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âh-r-f
|-
! Lemma
| harafa
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:harafithi|harafithi]] || [[word:harafiji|harafiji]] || [[word:harafishi|harafishi]] || [[word:harafi|harafi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:harafuthuth|harafuthuth]] || [[word:harafujuj|harafujuj]] || [[word:harafushush|harafushush]] || [[word:haraf|haraf]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:harafuthu|harafuthu]] || [[word:harafuju|harafuju]] || [[word:harafushu|harafushu]] || [[word:harafu|harafu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:harafufuth|harafufuth]] || [[word:harafufuj|harafufuj]] || [[word:harafufush|harafufush]] || [[word:harafuf|harafuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:harafethe|harafethe]] || [[word:harafeje|harafeje]] || [[word:harafeshe|harafeshe]] || [[word:harafe|harafe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:harafothoth|harafothoth]] || [[word:harafojoj|harafojoj]] || [[word:harafoshosh|harafoshosh]] || [[word:haraf|haraf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:harafotho|harafotho]] || [[word:harafojo|harafojo]] || [[word:harafosho|harafosho]] || [[word:harafo|harafo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:harafofoth|harafofoth]] || [[word:harafofoj|harafofoj]] || [[word:harafofosh|harafofosh]] || [[word:harafof|harafof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:harafĂŠthĂŠ|harafĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:harafĂŠjĂŠ|harafĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:harafĂŠshĂŠ|harafĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:harafĂŠ|harafĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:harafathath|harafathath]] || [[word:harafajaj|harafajaj]] || [[word:harafashash|harafashash]] || [[word:haraf|haraf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:harafatha|harafatha]] || [[word:harafaja|harafaja]] || [[word:harafasha|harafasha]] || [[word:harafa|harafa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:harafafath|harafafath]] || [[word:harafafaj|harafafaj]] || [[word:harafafash|harafafash]] || [[word:harafaf|harafaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:harafasha|harafasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goharafasha|goharafasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokiharafasha|gokiharafasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:harafnĂŒsha|harafnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goharafnknĂŒsha|goharafnknĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokiharafnĂŒsha|gokiharafnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:harafshĂ«sha|harafshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goharafnkshĂ«sha|goharafnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiharafshĂ«sha|gokiharafshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:harafrosha|harafrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goharafnkrosha|goharafnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiharafrosha|gokiharafrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:harafmusha|harafmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goharafnkmusha|goharafnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiharafmusha|gokiharafmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:harafsherasha|harafsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goharafnksherasha|goharafnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokiharafsherasha|gokiharafsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:harafngasha|harafngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goharafnkngasha|goharafnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokiharafngasha|gokiharafngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:harafyasha|harafyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goharafnkyasha|goharafnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokiharafyasha|gokiharafyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:harafyamasha|harafyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goharafnkyamasha|goharafnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokiharafyamasha|gokiharafyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:harafnĂŒshĂ«sha|harafnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goharafnknĂŒshĂ«sha|goharafnknĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokiharafnĂŒshĂ«sha|gokiharafnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:harafnĂŒrosha|harafnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goharafnknĂŒrosha|goharafnknĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiharafnĂŒrosha|gokiharafnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:harafnĂŒmusha|harafnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goharafnknĂŒmusha|goharafnknĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiharafnĂŒmusha|gokiharafnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:harafshĂ«nĂŒsha|harafshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goharafnkshĂ«nĂŒsha|goharafnkshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokiharafshĂ«nĂŒsha|gokiharafshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:harafshĂ«rosha|harafshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goharafnkshĂ«rosha|goharafnkshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiharafshĂ«rosha|gokiharafshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:harafshĂ«musha|harafshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goharafnkshĂ«musha|goharafnkshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiharafshĂ«musha|gokiharafshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:harafronĂŒsha|harafronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goharafnkronĂŒsha|goharafnkronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokiharafronĂŒsha|gokiharafronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:harafroshĂ«sha|harafroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goharafnkroshĂ«sha|goharafnkroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokiharafroshĂ«sha|gokiharafroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:harafromusha|harafromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goharafnkromusha|goharafnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiharafromusha|gokiharafromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:harafmunĂŒsha|harafmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goharafnkmunĂŒsha|goharafnkmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokiharafmunĂŒsha|gokiharafmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:harafmushĂ«sha|harafmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goharafnkmushĂ«sha|goharafnkmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokiharafmushĂ«sha|gokiharafmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:harafmurosha|harafmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goharafnkmurosha|goharafnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiharafmurosha|gokiharafmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:haraf|haraf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hĂŠrĂŠf|hĂŠrĂŠf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hoharaf|hoharaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hohĂŠrĂŠf|hohĂŠrĂŠf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohoharaf|hohoharaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohohĂŠrĂŠf|hohohĂŠrĂŠf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:nĂŒharaf|nĂŒharaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŒhĂŠrĂŠf|nĂŒhĂŠrĂŠf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒharaf|nĂŒnĂŒharaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒhĂŠrĂŠf|nĂŒnĂŒhĂŠrĂŠf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:nĂŻharaf|nĂŻharaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŻhĂŠrĂŠf|nĂŻhĂŠrĂŠf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻharaf|nĂŻnĂŻharaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻhĂŠrĂŠf|nĂŻnĂŻhĂŠrĂŠf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:luharaf|luharaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:luhĂŠrĂŠf|luhĂŠrĂŠf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluharaf|luluharaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluhĂŠrĂŠf|luluhĂŠrĂŠf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:liharaf|liharaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lihĂŠrĂŠf|lihĂŠrĂŠf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:liliharaf|liliharaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilihĂŠrĂŠf|lilihĂŠrĂŠf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:koharaf|koharaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kohĂŠrĂŠf|kohĂŠrĂŠf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokoharaf|kokoharaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokohĂŠrĂŠf|kokohĂŠrĂŠf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:keharaf|keharaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kehĂŠrĂŠf|kehĂŠrĂŠf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekeharaf|kekeharaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekehĂŠrĂŠf|kekehĂŠrĂŠf]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c0cba0}}
